allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, State, OwningProcess")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "Get-Process -Id 23656 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, Name, StartTime")
